SEARCH
Package Cataphract.API.Dragon

Class AccountDelete

java.lang.Object
Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountDelete
public class AccountDelete extends Object
A class to delete user accounts on the system. Can be restricted by policy "account_create" Can be restricted by policy "account_delete"
Since:
0.0.1 (Mosaic 0.0.1)
Version:
3.9.7 (20-February-2024, Cataphract)
Author:
DAK404 (https://github.com/DAK404)

    • administratorSession

      private void administratorSession() throws Exception
      Administrator session for account deletion. Administrators can delete other user accounts.
      Throws:
      Exception - If an error occurs during the process.

    • accountDeletionLogic

      private boolean accountDeletionLogic(String username) throws Exception
      Logic for account deletion.
      Parameters:
      username - The username to be deleted.
      Returns:
      true if the deletion is successful, otherwise false.
      Throws:
      Exception - If an error occurs during the process.

      private boolean login() throws Exception
      Login method.
      Returns:
      true if login is successful, otherwise false.
      Throws:
      Exception - If an error occurs during the process.

    • deleteFromDatabase

      private boolean deleteFromDatabase()
      Method to delete user account from the database.
      Returns:
      true if the deletion is successful, otherwise false.

    • deleteDirectories

      private boolean deleteDirectories(File delFile) throws Exception
      Method to delete directories recursively.
      Parameters:
      delFile - The file to be deleted.
      Returns:
      true if the deletion is successful, otherwise false.
      Throws:
      Exception - If an error occurs during the process.
